raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'make this stronger' primarily refer to strengthening the scientific arguments and claims (e.g., thesis, logic, evidence, novelty), or to improving the writing style and flow?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the text stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution to enhance its impact.","R1.2":"Verifying logical consistency is central to strengthening the overall argument chain in the research description.","R1.3":"Aligning claims with reported evidence is central to making the results and improvements more convincing.","R1.4":"Assessing novelty against prior work is central to highlighting the system's strengths more effectively.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to making the writing more persuasive and stronger.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is central to responsibly strengthening claims without misleading readers.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing when making the description stronger to prevent exaggeration of benefits.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope is central to ensure strengthening stays within the described system's domain.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is central given the artifact's focus on an AI translation system with potential misuse risks.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is central for any modifications made to strengthen the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'make this stronger' primarily refer to strengthening the scientific arguments and claims (e.g., thesis, logic, evidence, novelty), or to improving the writing style and flow?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the text stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution to enhance its impact.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is central to strengthening the overall argument chain in the research description.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning claims with reported evidence is central to making the results and improvements more convincing.
rationale.R1.4: Assessing novelty against prior work is central to highlighting the system's strengths more effectively.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is central to making the writing more persuasive and stronger.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is central to responsibly strengthening claims without misleading readers.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing when making the description stronger to prevent exaggeration of benefits.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope is central to ensure strengthening stays within the described system's domain.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is central given the artifact's focus on an AI translation system with potential misuse risks.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is central for any modifications made to strengthen the artifact.
